intro: This archive collects six advisories from the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) published between April 12 and April 17, 2026. The alerts primarily address high-severity vulnerabilities, with five rated high and one critical. Among the specific flaws highlighted are CVE-2026-34197, a high-severity issue with a CVSS score of 8.8, alongside CVE-2024-20662 and CVE-2024-21412. These entries document the agency's ongoing effort to catalog and mitigate significant security risks within that timeframe.
